About me

Analytical by nature,
data-driven by practice

I'm a Data Analyst based in Maharashtra, India, with hands-on experience at TCS, Deloitte, and Accenture. I specialise in exploratory data analysis, dashboard development, and business intelligence reporting.

From cleaning messy datasets to building interactive dashboards that guide business decisions, I enjoy every step of turning raw data into meaningful stories that stakeholders can act on.

I'm currently seeking an entry-level Data Analyst or Business Analyst role where I can contribute and grow.

Global Layoffs Analysis

A/B Experiment Analysis

Google SheetsLooker Studio
Customer Churn Analysis

Analysed 7,043 customers to identify churn drivers impacting $139K in recurring revenue. Found that month-to-month contracts drove a 26.54% churn rate — leading to targeted retention recommendations.
